description: Real-public-data validation of BioResearch Agent workflows (honest, reproducible, evidence-graded). Not a leaderboard benchmark.

cases.name: Parkinson's disease biomarker discovery
cases.evidence_grade: B (real public data; bulk microarray; single cohort)

cases.name: Alzheimer's disease causal evidence (risk factor -> AD)
cases.data: SYNTHETIC GWAS (ground-truth effect known by construction); real IVW engine. Real-data version would use SSGAC educational attainment -> IGAP/GR@P AD.
cases.evidence_grade: C (synthetic GWAS; MR-engine validation in AD context)

cases.name: Alzheimer's disease literature gap analysis
cases.data: PubMed E-utilities (REAL public data when reachable; built-in illustrative corpus fallback for offline reproducibility).
cases.evidence_grade: B (real PubMed when reachable) / C (offline built-in corpus fallback)

cases.name: Exposure -> outcome MR exemplar
cases.data: SYNTHETIC GWAS (ground-truth effect known by construction); real IVW engine. Real-data version would use GLGC/UKBB BMI -> DIAGRAM/UKBB T2D.

cases.name: Causal evidence chain (GWAS -> eQTL -> coloc -> TWAS -> fine-map -> MR)
cases.disease: general (methodology exemplar; AD loci as real-data target)
cases.data: SYNTHETIC loci with ground-truth labels (colocalized / eQTL-only / GWAS-only / null); real coloc(PP.H4) + TWAS(S-PrediXcan) + fine-map(credible set) + Wald-ratio MR engine. Real-data version would use AD GWAS (IGAP) + eQTL (GTEx brain) for TREM2/BIN1/APOE/CLU/PICALM.

cases.name: Causal evidence chain on real AD GWAS + GTEx brain eQTL summary
cases.data: REAL public summary-level data: Jansen et al. 2019 AD GWAS (IGAP-style, ~9.6M SNPs) + GTEx v8 13 brain-region cis-eQTL. Paths are user-local; raw data NEVER enters the repo (DATA_GOVERNANCE.md). Approximate coloc/TWAS/fine-map/MR using lead-SNP summary statistics; definitive fine-mapping requires full eQTL weights + LD reference panel.
cases.evidence_grade: B (real public summary-level data; no individual-level data; summary-statistics-only approximation)
